case_title: KING XIONG CHONG VS. DONG XIA ZHANG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, DONG XIA
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG, KING XIONG AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, DONG XIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHONG, KING XIONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, DONG XIA THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S EXPENDITURES WERE A LOAN, OR THAT DEFENDANT PROMISED TO REPAY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
